column5: No separate backdrop div to leak (native `::backdrop`)
Native `::backdrop` — no backdrop element/root to configure
`_closeAndCleanup` keeps `dialog-open` while any modal dialog remains
`.modal` container model gone; native dialog is the element
Dialog/drawer no longer use the custom FocusTrap util
Tab-cycle page scroll was custom focus-trap; native trap now
`::backdrop` transitions with the dialog in CSS
No manual `aria-hidden`; top layer + native inert
Shift-Tab bg scroll was custom focus-trap; native trap
Native dialog uses `[open]`, no inline `display` styles (CSP)
Native focus trap; DOM order irrelevant
Non-modal `show()` gets no aria-modal; verify backdrop:false+scroll:false
NVDA reads all modal content on launch; needs SR testing
`dialog-open` bare overflow:hidden, no gutter compensation → shift
Listeners bound once in constructor, not per-open
Native `cancel` fires on Esc after backdrop click
Dialog content overflows on resize (reported on v6-dev)
Close scrolls back to trigger (focus w/o `{preventScroll}`)
`dispose()` on open modal leaves body mutations
Safari offcanvas open changes window width → media query
Initial transition missing when placement set via JS
Modal scale/position w/ pinch-zoom iOS (likely wontfix)
Close offcanvas on browser back button
Menu always runs Floating UI (no nav exception)
Tooltip Escape dismiss already implemented in v6
input+toggle is Combobox's job; focus is integral
manual `.show` class never inits Menu — by design (DUP 41344)
select arrow vs autofill — browser limitation
Enter submits form — `<button>` type=submit HTML behavior
toggle still preventDefaults links — confirm v6 behavior
tooltip on radio (iOS Safari focus) — mostly browser
preventDefault on show blocks reopening (`_isHovered` not reset)
contenteditable arrow keys blocked in menu
arrow nav dead when toggle is `<input>` (maybe Combobox)
menu in table clipped by row stacking
label click in form-in-menu closes menu
don't dismiss popover on click-inside / allow text selection
log offending DOM node on duplicate-instance error
ESM named exports; no load-order problem
base-component disposes prior instance before re-set
Carousel on CSS scroll-snap — old touch/ride conflict gone
bad/undefined target — base-component returns early now
Carousel `.to()` docs example passes strings; should be numbers
navbar anchor behind fixed bar → document `scroll-margin-top`
show()/hide() rely on getter side-effects a minifier can strip
accordion race — toggling siblings can open both (dup 39385)
Collapse `aria-expanded` stuck true when trigger targets `.collapse`
smooth-scroll doesn't move focus to target (a11y)
smoothScroll preventDefault → URL hash never updates
memory leak — `data.js` elementMap is Map not WeakMap
proposal: full ScrollSpy rewrite (superseded by #42557 approach)
rename Alert close event to `hidden.bs.*` convention
auto-expand collapse/tab/accordion when id in URL fragment
option to disable EventHandler auto listener assignments
support Shadow DOM for JS plugins
non-DOM object fails silently — should v6 throw? (overlaps 38189)
utility state generation emits only functional `hover:` variant
mask-icon mixin in use — SVG→mask-image largely done
gap-based layout is the v6 standard (docs-only report)
`.btn-check` input nested in label → no scroll-to-(0,0) jump
navbar toggler is a `.btn` with tokens + currentcolor mask
`.btn-close` colored by currentcolor → dark theme works
list-group action vs disabled colors now distinct tokens
navbar reworked to theme tokens (`.navbar-dark` replaced)
`color-scheme` per theme → fixes dark scrollbars in light
navbar toggler icon currentcolor mask → visible both modes
breadcrumb divider SVG mask (RTLCSS issue gone)
dist CSS has zero empty custom properties
`.col` flex 1 1 0 with no min-width:0 by design
`.col` flex overflow is standard flexbox (user-side fix)
table cell scoping requires a row group by design
white iframe = third-party color-scheme (can't style cross-origin)
v6 contrast tokens author-defined (oklch); WCAG fn unused
gradient borders need border-image — out of scope for core
bare `.toast` has no position by design (toast-container)
`.row > *` applies gutter margin-top to `.w-100` column breaks
floating label stuck raised for date/time inputs
floating label stays raised on cleared-but-:autofill (Firefox)
disabled buttons use opacity → tint against colored bg
progress bar clips its text label at 0%/very-narrow
`<pre>` horizontal scrollbar covers last code line
length vars can't be runtime calc()/var() (compile-time multiply)
v6-dev far-right blank strip = `scrollbar-gutter:stable` on :root (ties to #42545)
table directional border vs inset shadow
tab border seam at fractional zoom
carousel rebuilt on CSS scroll-snap (Safari 12 below baseline)
v5-era StackBlitz tracking issue; v6 has fresh integration
docs no longer link popper.js.org → Floating UI
Popper bundled from js/src (broken vendor-path gone)
accordion scroll-jump is browser scroll-anchoring (out of scope)
jQuery-era window load carousel advice; v6 init model differs
v6 docs ship no Translations page
v5-only .browserslistrc bump; belongs on v5 line
toggle buttons don't set `aria-pressed="false"` at init (labeled v6)
`--toast-spacing` defined on .toast but consumed on container
production dist min files still emit sourceMappingURL comments
Sass utilities API section → reusable Astro component
dashboard example rebuilt sticky sidebar; recheck whole-page scroll
